/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL STIPULATES TO THE COURT RETAINING JURISDICTION OVER REESTITUTION BEYOND DEFENDANT'S TERM OF PROBATION/CONT/DOPU:WITH PD AUTHORITY/

/CAL:RESTITUTION REPORT/INTC/X:($35878,74 SF/X:THE COURT MAKES A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AND RETAINS JURISDICTION RE RESTITUTION AS TO ALL VICTIMS EXCEPT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION/DOPU:COUNSEL WITH AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ 6M/CTS:32/PF390 18/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/FOP1:3 MONTHS/LVAL/LCHEM/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'SRESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:03-19-19/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:ATTORNEY TO ACCEPT AMOUNT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/TEXT

/CAL:TO SET & CUST STATUS/INTC/CTORD: IF THE DEFENDANT MAKES BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:01-16-19 HEARING/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DO
